description_long: This is a bronze statue of a standing male figure dressed in a long coat, holding an object in his right hand and a laurel wreath in his left. The figure stands atop a multi-tiered rectangular pedestal adorned with detailed reliefs and decorative panels on all sides. The base of the pedestal features intricate carvings, possibly depicting historical or allegorical scenes. The statue has a weathered green patina typical of aged bronze, and the pedestal appears to be made of stone or metal with similar patination. The overall composition is formal and commemorative, suggesting a tribute to a notable individual. The sculpture is monumental in scale and would be a prominent feature in a public space.
description: A bronze statue of a man in a long coat stands atop a decorated pedestal with relief panels and a green patina, exuding a formal and commemorative presence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the male figure facing forward, holding a laurel wreath in his left hand and an object in his right, with detailed reliefs visible on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figure and the depth of the pedestal's relief panels, with the laurel wreath and hand gesture more pronounced.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the figure's coat and head, as well as the rear reliefs and structure of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, with the figure's right hand and the laurel wreath visible, and additional relief details on the pedestal.
attribute_subject_matter: standing male figure in formal attire holding a laurel wreath
attribute_location_context: The sculpture appears suited for installation in an outdoor urban plaza or park, as suggested by its monumental scale and formal pedestal.
